maps.title: MAP: Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization
maps.objective: To ensure be applicable to an nbfc-aa, despite their categorization as nbfcs-bl under the sbr framework

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization'. Document the existing Policy posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: Chapter-I Preliminary
Note: The above-mentioned Paragraphs 12, 13, 17(1) and 18 shall be
applicable to an NBFC-AA, despite their categorization as NBFCs-BL
under the SBR Framework.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Obtain Board/Management approval for policy: Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization
tasks.description: Present the drafted policy for 'Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization' to the Board or Senior Management for formal ratification. Record approval in the Board/Committee meeting minutes. Ensure the approved policy is version-controlled and stored in the policy repository.
tasks.expected_evidence: Board resolution or Committee minutes referencing policy approval
tasks.implementation_notes: Approval must be captured in formal minutes, not email.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization'. Required evidence types: Approved Policy Document. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Approved Policy Document
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be NBFC-AA, despite their categoriz
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Policy Review. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be NBFC-AA, despite their cate
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be NBFC-AA, despite their categorization'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
